behavior_summary: Provides examination (U8P_NSCROPS::look) and use/harvest behavior for an in-world crop item.
NSCROPS::look composes a short description by prefixing the literal "crops " and invoking the item's bark/display routine to show that text to the examiner.

NSCROPS::use interprets the item's frame (growth stage) to compute a yield count (deterministic base plus urandom perturbation for some frames), then repeatedly attempts to create/place spawned crop objects near the original item's coordinates.

For each successful placement the script marks the spawned object with a status bit and triggers its fall/drop so it appears physically in the world. Placement attempts stop when a small cap is reached or creation fails.
notable_control_flow: Event-driven: NSCROPS::look is invoked on Event 0 (examine/U8P_NSCROPS::look) and returns after calling Item::bark.
NSCROPS::use branches on Item::getFrame result (distinct behavior for frames 0, 1, 2) to set the yield/count.
A placement loop in U8P_NSCROPS::use iterates, calling FREE::24A7 to attempt object creation; loop increments a counter ([BP-08h]) and checks an upper bound (inferred cap ≈ 10).

After each successful FREE::24A7 call, the returned handle is stored, Item::orStatus is used to set a mask (0x0080 inferred), and Item::fall is invoked to finalize spawn. Failed placement short-circuits further actions for that iteration.
open_questions: Exact semantics and parameter meanings of FREE::24A7: is it a factory that returns an item handle, a placement validator, or both?
Meaning of the status mask 0x0080 applied with Item::orStatus on spawned objects (visual flag, prevent-reuse, ownership tag?)
Precise spatial distribution / displacement math used for spawn placement around the parent crop (geometry inferred but not explicit).
Whether there are additional frames beyond 0..2 and how they should behave (only frames 0,1,2 were observed).

main_function.name: U8P_NSCROPS::look
main_function.purpose: Produce a short in-game description/bark for the crop item when it is examined (prefixes 'crops ' and emits that via the item's bark routine).
entry_conditions: Event 0 (U8P_NSCROPS::look) — invoked when an actor/avatar examines or looks at the crop item

function_map.name: U8P_NSCROPS::look
function_map.role: Examination handler that composes and emits the short description 'crops ' via Item::bark.

function_map.name: U8P_NSCROPS::use
function_map.role: Harvest/activate handler: reads growth frame, computes yield, attempts to spawn/place multiple crop objects, marks them and triggers fall/drop.

function_map.name: Item::bark
function_map.role: Engine/item routine to present/display a short string from an item to a player/process.

function_map.name: Item::getFrame
function_map.role: Return the item's frame/index (interpreted as growth stage) used to select yield behavior.

function_map.name: urandom
function_map.role: Provide nondeterministic offset in a range [0,n-1] used to randomize yield counts.

function_map.name: Item::getX
function_map.role: Return item X coordinate for placement calculations.

function_map.name: Item::getY
function_map.role: Return item Y coordinate for placement calculations.

function_map.name: Item::getZ
function_map.role: Return item Z/plane coordinate for placement/validation.

function_map.name: FREE::24A7
function_map.role: Placement/factory routine that attempts to create or reserve a crop object at/near coordinates and returns a nonzero handle on success (inferred).

function_map.name: Item::orStatus
function_map.role: Bitwise-or a status mask into the target item's status flags (used to mark spawned items).

function_map.name: Item::fall
function_map.role: Trigger the spawned item's fall/drop behavior so it appears and settles in the world.

external_calls.purpose: Emit the literal description string 'crops ' from the crop item to the examiner/process.
Read growth stage/frame to select yield/count branch.
Provide randomized offset added to deterministic base yields for some frames.
Obtain X coordinate of the source crop for spawn placement.
Obtain Y coordinate of the source crop for spawn placement.
Provide Z/plane coordinate to the placement routine; used for validity/plane checks.
Attempt to create/place a spawned crop object at/near computed coordinates; returns a handle/id on success used by subsequent marking and fall.
Set a status bit (mask 0x0080 observed) on the newly created object to mark it for a particular state/behavior.
Trigger the spawned item's drop/fall so it enters the world physically after creation and marking.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Provides examination (U8P_NSCROPS::look) and use/harvest behavior for an in-world crop item.
